title: Purpsh
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Purpsh |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]]''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Vagaari Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I want you all dead, of course. ''[…]'' The only question remaining is the method. ''[…]''''"
"''Purpsh, for instance, would very much like to gun you all down right here so that he can enjoy your screams. Especially yours, Aristocra Formbi. But I've decided to let you choose exactly how you will die.|General Bearsh, to Ambassador Dean Jinzler|}} '''Purpsh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]] who accompanied [[Vagaari Empire]] [[Supreme Commander (Vagaari)|Supreme Commander]] [[Estosh]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Bearsh]], and [[Unidentified Vagaari (Formbi)|another]] Vagaari, all of which posed as [[Geroon]]s, during their [[Expedition to Outbound Flight|infiltration]] of a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] mission to [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]] in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]].''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' to [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]]. He installed a recorder in the navigational lines of the [[Cruiser/Legends|Chiss diplomatic vessel]] ''[[Chaf Envoy]]'' while Estosh talked with the fake [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Dean Jinzler]], preventing him from learning of Purpsh's actions. After the Vagaari had infiltrated the remains of the ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' [[Colonist/Legends|colony]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] at the Redoubt and Chiss [[Aristocra/Legends|Aristocra]] [[Chaf'orm'bintrano]] [[Core name/Legends|"Formbi"]] [[Charric/Legends|shot]] the third Vagaari infiltrator, Bearsh revealed the group's true identity. The general also infomed Jinzler that Purpsh wanted to gun everyone present in a conference room, however, he allowed the Chiss and the ambassador to choose if they wanted to die by a [[wolvkil]]'s attack, getting close to several [[schostri]], or by the method Purpsh preferred. ==Appearances== *''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Purpsh }} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Vagaari]]
